policies.refunds: Full refund within the first 7 days of subscription. No refunds after the 7-day trial period. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the dashboard. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.
policies.support: Basic plan: Email support during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST). Pro plan: 24/7 priority support via chat and email. Enterprise plan: Dedicated account manager with phone support.
policies.data_retention: All uploaded videos and project files are retained for 90 days after account cancellation. You can request a full data export at any time.
policies.free_trial: All new users get a 7-day free trial of the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.

faq.what_is_autostream: AutoStream AI is an intelligent video editing platform that uses artificial intelligence to automate editing workflows for content creators. It handles cuts, transitions, captions, and publishing — so you can focus on creating.
faq.how_does_ai_editing_work: Upload your raw footage and AutoStream's AI analyzes it for key moments, removes dead air, adds transitions, generates captions, and optimizes the output for your target platform.
faq.supported_formats: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input formats. Output is optimized per platform (e.g., 9:16 for TikTok/Reels, 16:9 for YouTube).
